abilities.shortEffect: Turns the sunlight harsh when entering battle, and boosts Attack while active.
abilities.effect: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle. The ancient pulse thrumming through the Pokémon also boosts its Attack stat in harsh sunlight.
